D2 Vision L2 Understand Atom

Colour Fades in the Dark

slide the luminance down and watch colours drain to grey as the cones fall silent

Only cones carry colour. As light drops below their threshold the rods take over, and rods report a single channel — brightness, with no hue.

Slide the scene luminance from daylight down to starlight. Watch the colour swatches lose their hue and converge on a dim bluish grey — the Purkinje-shifted world of rod-only night vision.
